title: Animations N’ Stuff
description: A Modpack about adding Actions & Stuff animations plus more to the game, so that the Immersion never Ends
body:
[![Animations N’ Stuff](https://modfolio.creeperkatze.de/modrinth/project/animations-n-stuff/downloads?color=ffbf80)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/animations-n-stuff)
[![Made by](https://img.shields.io/badge/Made%20By-Vanilama-darkred)](https://vanilama.vercel.app)

This Modpack Gives you maximum immersion and you're open to add any mod you want because this is a complete vanilla pack with endless posibilities. It contains mods & resourcepacks like:
- Detailed Animations (RP)
- Better Clouds (mod)
- iris + sodium (mods for shader support and performance)
- and many many more.

And with your Creativity you can expand the pack as much as you like but remember not all mods are compatible with one another.
Have Fun.


![discord server](https://dcbadge.limes.pink/api/server/https://discord.gg/wz3ZvfA7kQ)
